Book a Consultation →

The Craft

Signature services, executed as artistry.

Every treatment is designed and finished by hand — proportion, translucency, and line drawn to your features.

01

Smile Makeovers

A fully bespoke redesign of your smile. We study proportion, shade, and character against your face and personality, then build a plan that looks like the best version of you — never someone else.

  • —Digital smile preview
  • —Custom shade & shape
  • —Face-first design
02

Porcelain Veneers

Hand-finished ceramic artistry that corrects shape, color, and alignment with natural, light-catching translucency. Each veneer is layered by hand until it disappears into your smile.

  • —Minimal-prep options
  • —Hand-layered ceramic
  • —Lifelike translucency
03

Dental Implants

Permanent, lifelike tooth replacement engineered for function and finished for beauty. From single teeth to full arches, implants restore your bite and your confidence for good.

  • —Single & full-arch
  • —Guided placement
  • —Restored function
04

Full-Mouth Rehabilitation

Complex, life-restoring reconstruction that rebuilds health, bite, and confidence from the ground up. The most demanding work in dentistry, performed with patience and precision.

  • —Comprehensive plan
  • —Bite & health restored
  • —Staged for comfort
05

General Dentistry & Hygiene

The foundation beneath every transformation. Routine cleanings, exams, and preventive care delivered with the same precision and calm as the artistry — because a beautiful smile begins with a healthy one.

  • —Cleanings & exams
  • —Preventive care
  • —Healthy foundation

04The Experience

Three steps to the smile that's always been yours.

I

The Consultation

We listen first. Your goals, your history, your story — mapped into a clear, honest plan with no surprises.

II

The Design

Your new smile is sculpted digitally and previewed before a single procedure — designed around your face, not a template.

III

The Reveal

Precision execution, hand-finished detail, and the moment you see yourself fully — often for the very first time.

Begin

Not sure where to start? Let's talk it through.

Book Your Consultation

An atelier of cosmetic & implant dentistry by Dr. Trevor J. Thomas, DDS.
